subcodes.first_line: The All-Glorious, the Most High, hath ever remembered and continueth to remember His loved ones, though some, to outward seeming [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لازال غنی متعال اولیای خود را ذکر نموده و مینماید برخی اگر بر حسب ظاهر باثار
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power of prayer, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
